summary: First test run for Iglesia Nueva Vida Internacional (FastAPI + React + MongoDB). All 8 pytest backend tests passed (health, public news/events with featured, login valid/invalid, /auth/me, unauthorized POST, news + events full CRUD with persistence). All 10 frontend Playwright flows passed (home with hero/radio/grid, /noticias list+modal, /eventos with featured, /radio with play/mute/volume controls, /nosotros, admin invalid creds error, admin valid login redirect, admin create news visible on public /noticias, admin create featured event visible on /eventos, edit + delete operations, admin logout). Test data cleaned up via API.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with {ok:true} instead of 204 No Content (works but not REST-idiomatic).
No brute-force/rate-limit lockout (playbook expects lockout after 5 fails). Not blocking for this app spec but flagged per playbook_testing_instructions.

Does not set httpOnly cookie; only returns bearer token. Frontend stores token in localStorage (inv_token). Acceptable since spec says Bearer in Authorization header, but deviates from auth playbook expectation of httpOnly cookies.

issues: One benign console 401 logged during invalid-credentials test (expected behavior, not a bug).

action_items: (Optional) Consider migrating FastAPI startup/shutdown to lifespan context manager.
(Optional, per playbook) Add login throttling/lockout after 5 failed attempts if security hardening is desired.
(Optional) Standardize DELETE responses to 204 No Content.
critical_code_review_comments: bcrypt hash format correct ($2b$ via bcrypt.gensalt).
Admin seed is idempotent and updates password if env-defined password changes — good.
ObjectId properly excluded via projection {'_id':0} and serialize_doc helper.
CORS allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' fallback — would be a problem only if cookies were used; for Bearer auth it's fine. If switching to cookies, must set explicit origins.
JWT_SECRET is read from env (good). Token expiry 12h. No refresh-token flow (acceptable for admin-only app).
All routes correctly prefixed with /api. No hardcoded URLs in frontend; uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes — excellent for testability.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 3 sample news + 2 sample events (1 featured) on startup if collections empty. Confirmed seeded and visible publicly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — run with: pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. All API endpoints (/api/, /api/news, /api/events, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/me) work correctly. JWT Bearer auth via Authorization header. Frontend uses localStorage key 'inv_token'. All data-testids align with what the request listed (radio-play-btn, radio-mute-btn, radio-volume-slider, admin-email-input, admin-password-input, admin-login-submit, admin-login-error, admin-dashboard, tab-news, tab-events, add-news-btn, add-events-btn, form-* fields, edit-news-{id}, delete-news-{id}, edit-event-{id}, delete-event-{id}, admin-logout-btn). Delete confirmation uses window.confirm dialog — handle with page.on('dialog', d.accept()). TEST_ prefixed data was cleaned up.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA — all tests passed on first run.
